title: DisclosurePolicy
description: docs/canonical/TZ-00-domain-event-canon.md, section 19a.3 (added by canon 0.3.0, ADR-013, amendment 2). Owned by transparency-service (epd2_transparency_service.domain.DisclosurePolicy). field_rules is a structured list (field_path, disclosure_class, transformation, optional replacement_label); a candidate field with no matching rule, or more than one, resolves to prohibited (fail-closed, INV-10) - never overridable. small_cell_threshold defaults to 10. Status draft -> active (requires approved_by_role_id, INV-08) -> superseded (only when a new version is activated for the same applies_to_subject_type - never a standalone command). At most one active policy per applies_to_subject_type at a time.
